content:
I've been working on SublimeRead. You drop in an EPUB or PDF and it reads the book aloud in a natural AI voice, highlighting each line as it goes so you can read along or just listen. Your place syncs to the cloud, so you start on your laptop and pick up on your phone exactly where you left off.
What it does:

• Drop in any EPUB or PDF — your page stays exactly as the publisher set it

• Line-by-line AI narration — natural voices, with each sentence highlighted as it's read so you can follow along or just listen

• Multiple voices — pick one that actually sounds human

• Cloud sync — start on your laptop, pick up on your phone right where you left off

• Highlights, notes & bookmarks — all synced across devices

• Shelves — to organize your library
Only supports English language at the moment. More languages support coming soon.
Happy to answer any questions. Would love feedback. : )

  submitted by   /u/_ilamy
